items.checkin_comment: Thankfully the beer was better than the photo.
Let it warm up. Dunno why

items.badge_description: Round and round the wheel goes! Which style you’ll be drinking, nobody knows! Your desire to explore different styles is inspiring. Keep it up! That's a check-in to at least 200 different styles. Try 5 more for Level 41!
Ahh, the trusty pale ale; crisp, refreshing, and always a good choice in a bind. That's 295 different Pale Ales or American Pale Wheats. Try 5 more for Level 60.

user.bio: Constantly searching for new beers, no point stopping now?!
